name: stackra-observability/audit
purpose: Storage schema + retention module on top of the vendor-wrapped audit log — adds tenant_id + application_id columns, query surface, and retention scheduling.
capabilities: Storage adaptation on top of stackra/audit vendor wrap
when_to_use: A deployment needs the storage schema + retention scheduling layer on top of the hand-tuned audit wrapper.
when_not_to_use: For the vendor owen-it/laravel-auditing wrapper + trait, use the sibling stackra/audit under shared/.
